selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 11.0% and 20-day momentum is 14.0%.
Trend quality is supported by 60% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 8.8% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 1.6%, downside volatility near 1.2%, and a recent max drawdown of 5.2%.
Volume confirmation is 13.3% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 11.6% versus SPY over 5 days and 3.8% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.91, confidence 0.89, and 0.9 weighted articles across 2 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.91, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 2 articles across 2 sources, 1.0 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.81, average source quality 0.78, confidence 0.89.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.02).
Price action and news are pointing in the same direction, which raises trust in the setup.
Overall model score is 0.295 with high confidence.

news_evidence.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Surges 4.0%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
news_evidence.llm_reason: Directly about JNJ: reports a 4% intraday surge, higher-than-average volume, and upward earnings estimate revisions—items that are relevant for 1–10 day price action. Impact is moderately bullish but appears momentum-driven and lacks new fundamental catalysts or detailed guidance, so materiality is moderate.

news_evidence.title: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow futures climb as a halt to US-Iranian attacks is called
news_evidence.llm_reason: Macro/market-level news: US-Iran de-escalation boosting futures and broad indices. This is relevant because JNJ is sensitive to overall market risk sentiment, but the piece contains no company-specific information so the expected short-term impact on JNJ is small and driven only by general market moves.

thesis_monitor.summary: Risk is still manageable, but volatility widened versus a clean setup.
